common.title: Compress Images and Convert to WebP
common.subtitle: Upload photos or web images to compress them and convert them to WebP directly in your browser. Make files lighter for blogs, stores, portfolios, and landing pages without sending images to a server.
common.footer: All images are processed in your browser.

status.title: Processing Status
status.browser: Images are processed inside the browser

startMenu.label: Start menu
startMenu.title: Image Tools
startMenu.footer: Open the compression tool and image optimization guides from this menu.

compress.label: Main Program
compress.title: Image Compression Workspace
compress.description: Adjust quality and maximum dimensions, then drag images in or choose files. You can process multiple files at once and download the results immediately.

features.label: Feature List
features.title: Available Features
features.description: Compress images and convert them to WebP, then compare results by adjusting quality and maximum width and height for the publishing context.

about.label: About Site
about.title: About This Site
about.description: XP Image Compressor is an online utility designed to finish image optimization without installing a complicated editing program.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This site clearly explains image handling, analytics, advertising, and cookie-related practices for user trust.

features.title: Image Compression
features.description: Adjust quality and limit maximum dimensions for common formats such as JPEG and PNG to create web-ready files.

features.title: WebP Conversion
features.description: Use browser canvas capabilities to convert images to WebP, a modern format that can reduce file size and improve page loading.

features.title: Batch Processing
features.description: Select multiple images, process them sequentially, then download individual files or all processed results.

features.title: Browser-Based Privacy
features.description: Images are handled on the user's device and browser instead of being uploaded to an external server.

about.body1: This site is built for website owners, bloggers, designers, and store operators who often prepare images for the web. Large images can slow down pages and affect search performance, so optimizing them before upload is a useful habit.
about.body2: The classic desktop style is designed to feel like a familiar utility. Key settings and result comparison stay on one screen so users can keep the original and create a publishing copy with confidence.

guide: Set the quality slider and maximum width or height.
Drag images into the workspace or click to choose files.
Review the original size, result size, and reduction rate.
Convert to WebP when useful, then download the result.
privacy: Image compression and WebP conversion run in the browser. Selected image files are not uploaded to or stored on this site's server.
Analytics are used only when the operator enables them in the deployment environment, and they do not collect the contents of selected image files.
The AdSense script and ad placements are controlled by deployment settings. If advertising is enabled, this page will identify the provider and clearly explain how visitors can manage consent.
Information provided through contact, partnership, or feature request messages is used only for replies and service improvement.

compressor.ariaLabel: Image compression and WebP conversion tool

dropZone.title: Drag images here or click to choose files
dropZone.subtitle: You can select multiple JPG, PNG, GIF, and other image files at once.

directToWebP.title: Convert directly to WebP
directToWebP.description: Prioritize WebP output instead of a compressed original format. The original is kept when WebP is larger.

webp.title: Convert to WebP
webp.description: Create a smaller file at similar visual quality.
webp.tooltipDescription: WebP is a modern image format from Google that can reduce file size compared with JPEG or PNG and help improve web page loading speed.

seo.title: PixelZipKit XP Image Compressor - Free Image Compression and WebP Conversion
seo.description: Compress images and convert them to WebP in your browser for free. Optimize JPG, PNG, and other image files without server upload while protecting privacy.
seo.keywords: image compression, WebP converter, free image optimizer, JPG compression, PNG compression, browser image tool
